title: Light Up Christmas Half Wreath Rustic Rattan Twigs Stars Pine Cones Berries 33cm
features: 33cm wide, woven brown rattan twig shape base for a rustic look
Fdecorated with frosted foliage, wooden stars, white berries and pine cones
20 battery operated micro lights with jute bag for battery pack
description: Description: Embrace the enchantment of the winter woodland with the exquisite Winter Woodland Twig Half Wreath. Imbue your living space with the warmth and magic of the holiday season through its meticulous design. This captivating wreath artfully combines the finest natural pine and spruce foliage, adorned with delicate snowy white berries and rustic wooden stars. Including 20 battery-operated micro LED lights lends a gentle and inviting radiance, casting a welcoming glow that resonates with the festive spirit. Whether elegantly suspended on your front door or gracing your mantlepiece, this wreath serves as a beacon of seasonal delight, spreading joy to all who behold it. Key Features: Rattan twig base wreath adorned with frosty pine and spruce foliage, meticulously crafted to exude the charm of the winter woods. Thoughtfully embellished with exquisite snowberries, pinecones, and wooden stars for a touch of natural elegance. Twenty battery-operated micro LED lights create a soft and inviting glow, fostering a snug atmosphere synonymous with the holiday season. Including a durable jute rope ensures effortless hanging, facilitating the perfect placement of this enchanting wreath. Operational convenience is achieved with a power source of 3 x AA batteries (not included), allowing for seamless illumination. Designed for indoor use, this wreath seamlessly integrates into your interior decor, bringing the essence of the winter woodland indoors. Specifications: Diameter: 33cm (13 inches) Depth: 8cm Lights: 20 x white micro LED Base Material: Rattan Hanging Options: Jute rope Additional Information: The Winter Woodland Twig Half Wreath encapsulates the captivating charm of the winter woods, contributing to your living space.
